(1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 DELHI GAZETTE : EXTRAORDINARY [PART IV issued by the Government of India, Ministry of Home Affairs in the office of Registrar General India, the Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi hereby authorize to the Principal Magistrate of Juvenile Justice Board (JJB)'s/ Chairperson of Child Welfare Committee, to issue birth order in respect of delayed birth registration of Juveniles whose age verification is done by them, in the National Capital Territory of Delhi. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi is satisfied that it is necessary to do so; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the sub- section (3) of section 3, read with clause (e) of Section 2 of the National Security Act, 1980, the Lt. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi is pleased to direct that during the period 19-10-2015 to 18-1-2016 the Commissioner of Police, Delhi may also exercise the powers of detaining authority under sub section (2) of the section 3 of the aforesaid Act. By Order and in the Name of the Lt. Governor of National Capital Territory of Delhi, ASHISH KUMAR, Dy.
